mapper.insert: INSERT INTO star_note (user_id, title, lp_tag, kpi_id, situation, task, action, result, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{lpTag}, #{kpiId}, #{situation}, #{task}, #{action}, #{result}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE star_note SET title = #{title}, lp_tag = #{lpTag}, kpi_id = #{kpiId}, situation = #{situation}, task = #{task}, action = #{action}, result = #{result}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM star_note WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
